repos.name: java-faces-quick-start
repos.description: A production-ready Jakarta EE 10 kickstarter for building Java Faces applications. Ships with a complete login system out-of-the-box — registration, e-mail verification, password reset — so you can focus on building your features instead of your auth plumbing.

pinnedRepos.name: SpringAPI_EspacoGeek
pinnedRepos.description: A robust Spring Boot backend powering Espaço Geek. Features a comprehensive GraphQL API for managing geek culture media libraries (Anime, Movies, TV Series, Games), user watch-lists, JWT authentication, and automated data processing pipelines with Spring Batch.

pinnedRepos.name: NextJS_EspacoGeek
pinnedRepos.description: The modern, responsive frontend application for the Espaço Geek platform, built with Next.js and React. It consumes a robust GraphQL API via Apollo Client and features a dynamic UI styled with Tailwind CSS, built-in internationalization (i18n), JWT-based authentication, and user profile management for tracking geek culture media (Anime, Movies etc)
